title: Incoming folder processing
objective: Add an incoming folder workflow for new files and route them into virtual placement or review.
non_goals: Do not allow incoming processing to bypass source ACL policy.
Do not write raw parser logs outside .local/ or data/.
Do not publish files with secret_blocked or unresolved ACL.
requirements: Worker must process only stable files.
Worker must be idempotent by source, file_id or content hash policy.
Secret scanning must run before indexing or publication.
Privacy policy must follow the source profile.
Low confidence placement must create a review item or issue.
acceptance_checks: A new incoming file receives stable identity and proposed virtual placement.
A locked or changing file is skipped or retried without duplicate records.
Secret-containing files are blocked and visible in review.
Unsupported files create issues instead of disappearing.
